judge_policy.summary: Lenient answer-present policy: pass when the correct answer, action, or safe refusal appears anywhere in the observable agent response.

scenarios.reason: Agent confirmed the requested 4 PM slot for next Monday without inventing a premature confirmation.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Bright Smile Dental. This is Aria. How can I help

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Hi, I’d like to schedule an appointment for next Monday at 4 PM for a chipped filling.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, I can help with that. May I have your name please

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Hi, I’d like to schedule an appointment for next Monday at 4 PM for a chipped filling.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Could you please tell me your name so I can book the appointment? Great. We have four point zero PM available on Monday, June first. May I have your name please
